message:
Merge PR #2046: fix(sling,convoy): prevent double-spawn from stale cross-rig convoy feed

Bug fix: adds closed/tombstone bead guard to sling dispatch (defense-in-depth, not bypassed by --force). Adds cross-rig bead status fallback in convoy operations so stale dependency snapshots dont cause re-dispatch of completed work. Good test coverage. Author: tfgast
